meta.title: Share of AI Inference Tokens Served Locally in 2028
meta.question: By Dec 31 2028, what fraction of AI inference tokens (consumer + enterprise, all model classes) will be served from local/on-device hardware rather than centralized cloud APIs?
meta.resolution: (tokens on local hardware) / (total inference tokens) over a 90-day window ending Dec 31 2028. Local = phone NPU, laptop CPU/GPU/NPU, on-prem GPU, edge device. Cloud = OpenAI/Anthropic/Google/AWS Bedrock/Azure OpenAI/Together/Fireworks/etc. Sources: a16z + Sequoia AI infra reports, MLCommons/MLPerf inference stats, Apple Intelligence + Google AICore disclosure, HuggingFace + Together usage telemetry

priorJustifications.H1: Cloud token volume growing 3-5x YoY structurally swamps on-device adoption (NPU device replacement cycle 3-4yr). Local share currently ~3% of token volume. Apple Intelligence + Windows Copilot+ + Android AICore push local-by-default at OS level but distribution-level effect is bounded by replacement cadence + per-device utilization.
priorJustifications.H2: Modal-but-not-dominant given OS-default local routing for short-context tasks. 30-month forecast horizon limits resolution beyond this.
priorJustifications.H3: Significant minority local (30-50%) reflects real adoption shift driven by privacy push, hardware leap, or enterprise on-prem.
priorJustifications.H4: Tipping point (≥50%) requires combined hardware and software shift; surprise scenario.

rev4_governance_notes.denominator_scope_note: DENOMINATOR SCOPE: 'Local' = inference compute physically on user's device. Apple Private Cloud Compute (PCC) counts as CLOUD, not local, despite Apple's privacy framing — PCC is off-device server infrastructure operated by Apple. All telemetry counting (a16z/Sequoia/MLCommons/HuggingFace estimates) and the apple_routing_disclosure per_event_member trio are scored against this definition.
rev4_governance_notes.compound_projection_note: Lint compound projection bounds H2 at 0.914 firing all 12 indicators on starting prior. Conservative — does not model per_event_member exclusion across the share-band quartet (4 mutex bands) and apple_routing_disclosure trio (3 mutex bands), nor causal_event_id de-correlation across npu_diffusion_2027 / h1_macro_state_2027 clusters. Real-world update sequences expected ~0.75-0.82. Engine's saturation_redteam_required gate will trigger if approached.

redTeamGapsAddressed: Cloud-side telemetry measured at scale (OpenRouter 100T tokens/yr); local-side telemetry STRUCTURALLY MISSING from existing data sources
Copilot+ NPU utilization documented at <5% in early reports — install ≠ usage
Apple PCC vs on-device routing remains undisclosed (1.5B device base, largest swing factor)
Flexera cloud-vs-on-prem reference class: 21% repatriated but net cloud still growing — analog caps local at ~25-30% by 2028
Cloud inference price collapse (10x/year low-tier) undermines local cost-advantage thesis
meta.priorRevisionRationale: Round 2 confirmed cloud denominator grows fast (OpenAI 8.6T tokens/day; cloud price collapse 10x/yr). Reference class (cloud-vs-on-prem 2010-2020) caps local rebound at ~25-30%. Apple PCC undisclosed = high uncertainty but Apple architectural choice favors hybrid not pure-local. Copilot+ NPU utilization <5% means install base massively overstates actual local share. Net: H1 up 5pp (cloud denominator effect), H2 down 1pp, H3 down 2pp, H4 down 2pp.
relatedColdStoragePredictions: cold_004: Opus-class frontier LLM running locally on consumer smartphone by 2030 — prediction outside topic 2028 horizon but supports H2/H3 trajectory
meta.lensSetReason: Initial lens set during topic creation per skills/news-scan.md mapping

issues: Unfalsifiable hypotheses: H1, H2, H3, H4

blockers: NON-UNIFORM PRIORS without justification — posteriors are {'H1': 0.5, 'H2': 0.34, 'H3': 0.13, 'H4': 0.03} but posteriorHistory has no initial note explaining the asymmetry. Add a posteriorHistory entry documenting why.
warnings: No anti-indicators defined — every hypothesis needs at least one indicator that would REDUCE its probability

_design_rules: Each indicator must be OBSERVABLE — actions, not opinions
Each must have a clear fired/not-fired threshold
Every hypothesis needs at least one pro AND one anti indicator
Governor flags unfalsifiable hypotheses as DEGRADED

tier1_critical.desc: Best-available 2027 estimate of local-served inference token share (a16z + Sequoia + MLCommons + HuggingFace telemetry) reports >=25% by end Q4 2027.
Best-available 2027 estimate of local share <=8% by end Q4 2027 (cloud-dominated trajectory).
Best-available 2027 estimate of local share sits in 12-22% band by end Q4 2027 (modal growing-but-not-tipping trajectory).

tier2_strong.desc: Best-available 2027 estimate of local share sits in 22-35% band by end Q4 2027 (entering significant-minority territory but below tipping).
Apple discloses >=50% of Apple Intelligence query volume served on-device (per_event_member with 20-50% band and >=50% PCC band).
Apple discloses 20-50% of Apple Intelligence query volume served on-device (modal band).
Apple discloses >=50% of Apple Intelligence queries route to Private Cloud Compute (PCC = cloud per topic def, see meta).
Cumulative NPU-equipped consumer device install base exceeds 500M by end 2027. Source: Canalys / IDC device tracker.

An open-weights model within 10% of frontier-as-of-Q4-2027 on MMLU/AGIEval released and runnable on consumer hardware (<=64GB RAM) before end 2027 — anchored to MOVING frontier (REV4: was GPT-4-class, will commodity-fire by 2028). Source: HuggingFace + arxiv.

tier3_suggestive.desc: EU AI Act enforcement OR sector-specific (health, finance) EU regulation issues binding data-locality requirement for AI inference on EU-citizen data, before 2028. Source: EU Official Journal.

anti_indicators.desc: Cloud frontier-inference token volume grows >=3x YoY in any year 2026-2027 (denominator effect swamps local). Source: a16z / Sequoia AI infra reports.
Combined NPU-equipped consumer device install base <400M by end 2027 (REV4: tightened from <300M to close 300-500M dead zone). Source: IDC / Canalys.

actorModel.description: Local-served inference share by Q4 2028 emerges from: Apple PCC vs on-device routing decisions, NPU device install base, open-weights frontier-class model availability, EU data-locality regulation, and cloud-side token volume scaling.

apple.name: Apple
apple.role: Largest single arbiter of consumer-class on-device inference. PCC vs Apple-Silicon routing decision is per_event_member observable in WWDC/10-Q disclosures.
apple.decisionStyle: Privacy-as-product; willing to invest in on-device but PCC offload as backstop.
biases: Underweight cost of PCC at scale
filters: Device generation cycle, server cost trajectory, regulatory pressure

microsoft_copilotpc.name: Microsoft (Copilot+ PC ecosystem)
microsoft_copilotpc.role: Drives Windows-side NPU device adoption. Determines whether enterprise/consumer PC buyers move to local-capable hardware.
biases: Anchored to OpenAI integration; on-device is secondary path
filters: OEM device shipments, enterprise software contracts

google_pixel_android.name: Google (Pixel + Android NPU)
google_pixel_android.role: Tensor SoC + Gemini Nano define Android local inference path. Mid-range Android adoption broader than Pixel itself.
google_pixel_android.decisionStyle: Service-driven; cloud-favored business model creates cloud-vs-local tension.
biases: On-device as feature, not core strategy
filters: Pixel sales, Android NPU shipments, Gemini ecosystem

open_weights_labs.name: Open-Weights Labs (Meta Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek, Qwen)
open_weights_labs.role: Frontier-class open-weights availability is the supply side of consumer-runnable inference.

eu_regulators.name: EU Commission (AI Act + DMA + sector regulators)
eu_regulators.role: Data-locality mandates push inference physically into EU jurisdictions; some configurations favor on-device.
filters: AI Act enforcement actions, sector-specific rules

telemetry_estimators.name: Industry Telemetry (a16z + Sequoia + MLCommons + HuggingFace)
telemetry_estimators.role: Synthesize estimate of local-vs-cloud share. Publication cycle is annual (Q1).
telemetry_estimators.decisionStyle: Methodologically uneven; consensus emerges from triangulation.
filters: API call volumes, model deployment counts, benchmark submissions

methodology: DENOMINATOR SCOPE — 'Local' = silicon physically in user's device. Apple PCC counts as CLOUD per topic.meta.rev4_governance_notes.denominator_scope_note.
APPLE DISCLOSURE PER_EVENT_MEMBER — apple_routing_disclosure trio (>=50% on-device / 20-50% / >=50% PCC) is mutually exclusive. One band fires per disclosure.
SHARE BAND PER_EVENT_MEMBER — Annual telemetry estimate maps to one of 4 bands. Engine enforces mutex via shape=per_event_member.
NPU DIFFUSION CLUSTER — Apple routing + NPU install base + open-weights release share causal_event_id=npu_diffusion_2027. One technology-diffusion event should not triple-update H4.
MOVING FRONTIER — open-weights indicator anchored to 'within 10% of frontier-as-of-Q4-2027' not GPT-4 (would commodity-fire by 2028).

telemetry_estimators.label: Local-vs-cloud share estimators (a16z + Sequoia + MLCommons + HuggingFace telemetry)
telemetry_estimators.note: Resolution observable. 4 share-band indicators per_event_member with causal_event_id=ai_local_share_telemetry_q4.

apple_disclosure.label: Apple Intelligence routing disclosure (WWDC keynote + 10-Q breakouts)
apple_disclosure.note: Per_event_member trio (>=50% on-device / 20-50% / >=50% PCC) under causal_event_id=apple_routing_disclosure. PCC counts as CLOUD per topic.meta.

canalys_idc_device_tracker.label: Cumulative NPU-equipped consumer device install base (Apple Silicon, iPhone 16+, Copilot+ PC, Snapdragon X, Pixel 9+)
canalys_idc_device_tracker.note: t2_npu_install_base_500m + anti_local_install_base_below_400m (tightened in REV4 from <300M to close dead zone). Shares causal_event_id=npu_diffusion_2027 with apple/openlab.

open_weights_releases.label: Frontier-class open-weights model releases + benchmark scores
open_weights_releases.note: t2_local_inference_open_lab_release. REV4 anchored to MOVING frontier (within 10% of frontier-as-of-Q4-2027) not GPT-4 (would commodity-fire by 2028).

eu_oj_ai_act.label: EU Official Journal — AI Act enforcement + sector-specific data-locality regulation
eu_oj_ai_act.source: EU Official Journal + EU sectoral regulators

cloud_token_volume.label: Cloud frontier-inference token volume (a16z / Sequoia AI infra reports)
cloud_token_volume.note: anti_cloud_token_volume_3x_yoy. Shares causal_event_id=h1_macro_state_2027 with install-base anti.

resolved.entry_a_text: Hyperscaler CapEx Hits $600B in 2026 as AI Inference Demand Absorbs Cloud Capacity — Reports inference now 60-70% of hyperscaler AI compute demand with capacity absorbed as fast as deployed, supporting H1 (cloud-dominated) by showing structural cloud lock-in and oligopoly hardening through 2026.
resolved.entry_b_text: Magnificent 7 earnings reveal AI spending surge with hyperscaler capex set to reach $725 billion in 2026 — Quantifies $725B 2026 cloud AI infrastructure investment by the four largest hyperscalers, evidence the centralized-cloud share is being entrenched rather than displaced by local inference, supporting H1.
resolved.reason: Numeric divergence 99.7% on metric (context: ai): new=7.0, existing=2026.0, threshold=10%
